title: Bridge Essay: Echoes from Intrinsic Connectivity Networks in the Subcortex.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Non-fabrication — spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, creative insight, DMN.
**Phase context:** Spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, creative cognition.

**Echoes from Intrinsic Connectivity Networks in the Subcortex.** — J Neurosci (2023). DOI: 10.1523/JNEUROSCI.1020-23.2023. PMID: 37562962. Decades of research have greatly improved our understanding of intrinsic human brain organization in terms of functional networks and the transmodal hubs within the cortex at which they converge. However, substrates of multinetwork integration in the human subcortex are relatively uncharted. Here, we leveraged recent advances in subcortical atlasing and ultra-high field (7 T) imaging optimized for the subcortex to investigate the functional architecture of 14 individual structures in healthy adu
